Class TVSeries

java.lang.Object
TVSeries
public class TVSeries extends Object
Represents a TV series entry in the user's media list.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TVSeries(String title, String genre, String creator, int noOfEpisodes, boolean isRealityTV)
    Creates a TV series with its details and generates episode objects.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TVSeries

      public TVSeries(String title, String genre, String creator, int noOfEpisodes, boolean isRealityTV)
      Creates a TV series with its details and generates episode objects.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the TV series
      genre - the genre of the TV series
      creator - the creator/writer/director of the TV series
      noOfEpisodes - the total number of episodes
      isRealityTV - whether the series is reality TV Pre-condition: Title, genre, and creator are valid strings. noOfEpisodes is a positive integer. Post-condition: A TVSeries object is created with the specified details, and episode objects are generated.

  • Method Details

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()

    • getStatus

      public int getStatus()

    • getRating

      public int getRating()

    • getReview

      public String getReview()

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(int newStatus)
      Updates the watching status of the TV series.
      Parameters:
      newStatus - the new status code Pre-condition: newStatus should ideally be between 0 and 2. Post-condition: The status is updated if valid, otherwise an error message is printed.

    • updateProgress

      public void updateProgress(int episodeInput)
      Marks all episodes up to the given episode number as watched.
      Parameters:
      episodeInput - the episode number up to which to mark as watched Pre-condition: episodeInput is a valid episode number. Post-condition: Episodes from 1 to episodeInput are marked as watched.

    • findEpisode

      public Episode findEpisode(int episodeNumber)
      Finds and returns an episode by its number, or null if not found.
      Parameters:
      episodeNumber - the number of the episode to find
      Returns:
      the Episode object if found, or null if not found Pre-condition: episodeNumber is a valid integer. Post-condition: The corresponding Episode object is returned, or null if it does not exist.

    • rateEpisode

      public void rateEpisode(int episodeNumber, int rating)
      Rates a specific episode by its number.
      Parameters:
      episodeNumber - the number of the episode to rate
      rating - the rating to assign to the episode Pre-condition: episodeNumber corresponds to an existing episode. Post-condition: The specified episode is rated if it exists.

    • markEpisodeWatched

      public void markEpisodeWatched(int episodeNumber)
      Marks a specific episode as watched.
      Parameters:
      episodeNumber - the number of the episode to mark as watched Pre-condition: episodeNumber corresponds to an existing episode. Post-condition: The specified episode is marked as watched if it exists.

    • favoriteEpisode

      public void favoriteEpisode(int episodeNumber)
      Toggles the favorite status of a specific episode.
      Parameters:
      episodeNumber - the number of the episode to favorite or unfavorite Pre-condition: episodeNumber corresponds to an existing episode. Post-condition: The favorite status of the specified episode is toggled.

    • displayEpisodes

      public void displayEpisodes()
      Prints all episodes and their details. Pre-condition: The TV series has a list of episodes. Post-condition: The details of all episodes are printed to the console.

    • rate

      public void rate(int rating)
      Rates the TV series from 1 to 10, only if completed.
      Parameters:
      rating - the rating score to assign Pre-condition: The TV series status must be 2 (Completed), and rating must be between 1 and 10. Post-condition: The rating is saved successfully if conditions are met.

    • review

      public void review(String text)
      Adds a text review for the TV series, only if completed.
      Parameters:
      text - the review content Pre-condition: The TV series status must be 2 (Completed), and the text must not be null or blank. Post-condition: The review is saved successfully if conditions are met.

    • displayInfo

      public String displayInfo()
      Returns a formatted string of all TV series details.
      Returns:
      a formatted string containing the TV series's details Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A string with the TV series's information is returned.
